zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne於大約1362年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，她的父親Eóghan John Macdougall47歲，母親Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia26歲。她於1374年與John Stewart Laird of Lorn在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年12月21日在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾格勒諾爾享年78歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne于大约1362年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，她的父亲Eóghan John Macdougall47岁，母亲Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia26岁。她于1374年与John Stewart Laird of Lorn在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1439年12月21日在英国苏格兰阿吉爾格勒諾爾享年78岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: Macdougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne was born about 1362, in Argyll, Scotland, her father, Eóghan John Macdougall, was 47 and her mother, Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia, was 26. She married John Stewart Laird of Lorn in 1374, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 21 December 1439, in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne est née environ 1362, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Eóghan John Macdougall, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Joanna Jonet Isaac d’Ergadia, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Stewart Laird of Lorn en 1374, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 décembre 1439, à Glenorchy, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne um 1362 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eóghan John Macdougall 47 und ihre Mutter Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia 26. Sie hat 1374 in Argyll, Scotland John Stewart Laird of Lorn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Dezember 1439 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Glenorchy, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne è nata il circa 1362 nel Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Eóghan John Macdougall, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato John Stewart Laird of Lorn nel 1374, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 21 dicembre 1439, nel Glenorchy, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorneが約1362年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Eóghan John Macdougallは47歳，母Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadiaは26歳であった。1374年にスコットランドアルグイルでJohn Stewart Laird of Lornと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年12月21日にイギリススコットランドアルグイルグレノーチイで78歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.Dunstaffnage Castle, Lorne, Argyll and B: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 루브하 가브h
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne(이)가 대략 1362년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eóghan John Macdougall(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1374년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 John Stewart Laird of Lorn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 12월 21일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 글렌르c히에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne nasceu aproximadamente 1362, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Eóghan John Macdougall, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Stewart Laird of Lorn em 1374, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1439, em Glenorchy, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Dunstaffnage Castle, Lorne, Argyll and B: рубха гарбх, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne родилась около 1362 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Eóghan John Macdougall было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Stewart Laird of Lorn в 1374 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 21 декабря 1439 г. в местности гленорчи, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne nació aproximadamente 1362, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Eóghan John Macdougall, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia, tenía 26 años. Se casó con John Stewart Laird of Lorn en 1374, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1439, en Glenorchy, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
